message:
Command `# amuxbus is only in port list (module declaration), NOT connected to u_core. 
# This is the pattern that caused GPL-0326 previously - ports declared but undriven
# Check the DEF template to understand if these ports exist there
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/def/
echo "---"
grep -c "amuxbus" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/def/*.def 2>/dev/null | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# amuxbus is only in port list (module declaration), NOT connected to u_core. 
# This is the pattern that caused GPL-0326 previously - ports declared but undriven
# Check the DEF template to understand if these ports exist there
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/def/
echo "---"
grep -c "amuxbus" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/def/*.def 2>/dev/null | head -5
